title: oncidium crista-galli
intro: Oncidium crista-galli, a species of orchid commonly known as the Crested Oncidium, is a type of epiphytic plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncidium crista-galli include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
